name: Metformin
indication: First-line oral therapy for type 2 diabetes; improves insulin sensitivity and lowers hepatic glucose output.

name: Enbrel
indication: TNF inhibitor for autoimmune diseases such as rheumatoid arthritis, psoriatic arthritis, and plaque psoriasis.

name: Atorvastatin
indication: Statin used to lower LDL cholesterol and reduce cardiovascular risk.
